title: cissus biternata
intro: Cissus biternata, also known as Veldt Grape or Bitter Vine, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, alleviating arthritis symptoms, and supporting bone health. Cissus biternata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
